summary: Bug fix verified: 'Показать товар' button now displays correctly in My Purchases page. The fix handles delivered_content as both array and string formats. Backend API returns delivered_content correctly, frontend displays it properly with expand/collapse functionality.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for 'Показать товар' button verified. The MyMarketPurchases component in TraderDashboard.js (lines 2027-2158) now correctly handles delivered_content as both array and string formats. The condition at line 2095 checks: purchase.delivered_content && (Array.isArray(purchase.delivered_content) ? purchase.delivered_content.length > 0 : purchase.delivered_content). Backend endpoint GET /api/marketplace/my-purchases (server.py lines 3914-3928) returns delivered_content without exclusion. All 11 purchases with delivered_content show the 'Показать товар' button correctly.
